tools.name: docs-helper
tools.description: Helps write and review project documentation following the repo's house style.

tools.name: diagram-generator
tools.description: Converts natural-language or an engine-neutral node/edge/container spec into portable tier-2 SVG and PNG diagrams.

tools.name: doc-site
tools.description: Scaffolds an Astro 5 + Starlight docs site into a target repo from an agent-driven interview: env-driven site/base, manifest-driven sidebar/symlinker/drift guard, optional diagrams (via diagram-generator) and deploy wiring.

tools.name: readme-author
tools.description: Create or restructure a polished, professional README.md, with an optional architecture diagram.
